title: rubus × pesianus
intro: Rubus × pesianus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or loganberry, is a plant species that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × pesianus include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × pesianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, as well as its potential to act as an antiviral and antibacterial agent. Rubus × pesianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, and its leaves and fruits can also be used in salads or as a garnish.
